WritersProof

Detecting...

Build your authorship attestation.

WritersProof documents your creative control over your work. Navigate to any supported web editor or publishing platform and click Start Witnessing.

Every keystroke interval and content change is hash-chained into a cryptographic attestation of your authorship process.

Full attestation active

Hardware attestation, VDF time-proofs, Ed25519 signatures, and Secure Enclave binding via the desktop app.

View Version History

Navigate to a supported document editor to begin.

Browser-only mode

Lightweight browser-based attestation with SHA-256 hash chains. For hardware-backed attestation with VDF time-proofs and Secure Enclave signing:
